Before the GOATs dominated the golden ball, there was ONE African King.

George Weah in 1995: The only African player to ever win the Ballon d'Or. Solo brilliance, electrifying pace, and vital goals for AC Milan. He didn't just play; he dictated. A true legend who broke barriers. #FootballHistory #AfricanLegends
